envelopeType.description: Dot-separated envelope-type discriminator (e.g., `'prd.create'`, `'theme.update'`). Host's envelope router dispatches when an envelope of this type fires. Pattern enforces `<domain>.<verb>` shape.

payloadSchema.description: Optional JSON Schema for the envelope payload. When set, the host's envelope router validates incoming envelopes against this schema BEFORE dispatching the workflow. Validation failure does NOT start the workflow; the host emits a routing-error event instead.
